goal: Prune the migrated kelivo repository so it keeps the OpenHarmony-focused repo surface only.
deliverable: A cleaned repository that still builds a .hap and is ready to push to GiantGKL/kelivo master.
constraints: Do not fully rewrite lib-level platform logic
Do not commit secrets or machine-local state
acceptance_criteria: Keep README aligned with OHOS fork status
completion_language_policy: Do not claim all non-OHOS source logic has been removed
